fix: Thread effective enable_thinking into MLLMScheduler/MLLMBatchRequest and apply MiMo thinking-off logits policy in MLLMBatchGenerator._make_request_sampler: suppress native <think>/</think> tags and suppress <|im_end|> only before the first generated token.
why: SimpleEngine MiMo thinking-off fixes did not cover the continuous-batching route required for prefix/paged/L2 cache release rows.
release_boundary: This is source regression coverage only. It does not clear MiMo continuous-batching live cache/L2 rows, tool rows, speed target, source-vs-quant classification, or VL/audio/video support.
